offer: For legal billing specialists processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate invoice formatting causes cash flow gaps. We convert timesheet data into formatted invoices instead of manual invoice creation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate invoice formatting from timesheet data
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for legal billing specialists
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to legal billing specialists with demo video
Participate in community forums for legal billing tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for timesheets and templates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
